title: Amtech – Multi Axe, Versatile Use, Heavy-Duty Build, Backed by Amtech S, Everyday Diy & Trade Applications
features: 4-IN-1 MULTI AXE DESIGN: Combines an axe, hammer, nail puller and pry bar into one compact, versatile hand tool.
ONE-PIECE STEEL CONSTRUCTION: Strong single-piece steel build provides durability and strength for demanding tasks.
IDEAL FOR DIY & OUTDOOR USE: Suitable for general DIY, renovation, camping and emergency applications where versatility matters.
INTEGRATED HAMMER & PRY FUNCTIONS: Allows driving nails, pulling fixings and levering materials without changing tools.
ERGONOMIC RUBBER GRIP: Designed to improve comfort and control during extended use.
description: From the manufacturer Am-Tech Multi Axe One piece steel construction Features hammer, nail puller, pry bar and axe Fitted with comfortable rubber grip See More
